item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: Just restored this 1934 Crosley grandfather clock radio
item.description:
This was donated to our museum recently. It is a early 30s Crosley grandfather clock radio. It's made out of a interesting material. Steamed pressed plywood to get the appearance of carved wood even though it's just crappy plywood veneer.
Is it just me or is this the dial sort of look Edward Gorey/edward scissorhands?
I polished the original electrolytic capacitor containers which are in the copper cans
Little spring pulled ribbon with pulleys adjusts the station indicator behind a lamp. The chassis was overhauled. All new capacitors, and lots of new wiring
This is a manual start synchronous motor. Meaning when you lose power it intentionally stops you'll know that your clock is incorrect.
The thin plywood had started to pull away from parts of the frame. So I reglued and clamped that to stabilize
item.dc:creator: oldradios19772000

item.title: Memes vol 503 Boobie
item.description:
Another edition of memes my boyfriend and I have sent each other- 1 year anniversary edition
Ms. Chompy
Me :(
“They say you want to be loved from your head to your toes until you start lovin toes”
I sent him a reel with a reel of this kid and said “I want a small fat child”
This just a fast track to the last of us
He sent me this while I was wearing this color
Looney Toons ass
Big Mama tax
Scruffy, Liza Jane and Froggy tax
Nessie tax. Happy Anniversary @chriscaprisun I love you!!!

item.dc:creator: KR1570F

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1271 (Wizardposting IX)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. Summon this bread? Summon Bread II.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I don't know. Whatdoin!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Reality check from older trans person
item.description: There were even laws against it that many are trying to reinstate. They will always consider you a man in a dress. I didn't include trans men here because these thugs don't care about them outside of the fact they consider them women who have been brainwashed by "gender ideology" because women are "obviously not smart enough to think for themselves /s"
item.dc:creator: dickblack12
